name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship language model delivering human-like conversation, code generation, and creative writing. Industry-leading inference speed and quality.
consensusVerdict: Essential tool for productivity. Unmatched conversational ability.

name: AWS
description: Amazon Web Services: comprehensive cloud infrastructure with EC2, RDS, S3, and 200+ services. Industry standard but complex.
consensusVerdict: Gold standard infrastructure. Steep learning curve, pricing can surprise.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: AI pair programmer for every developer
description: GitHub's AI-powered code completion tool. Real-time suggestions, supports 20+ languages, reduces boilerplate writing.
consensusVerdict: Transforms how developers code. Worth the subscription.

name: Vercel
tagline: The frontend cloud for Next.js and React
description: Vercel's edge platform with serverless functions, auto-scaling, and sub-100ms global deployments. Built for Next.js.
consensusVerdict: Best-in-class frontend deployment. The gold standard.

name: Notion
tagline: All-in-one workspace for notes, databases, and collaboration
description: Notion's flexible workspace combines databases, wikis, and documents. Slow sync, feature-rich but sometimes overwhelming.
consensusVerdict: Powerful but slow. Best for organized teams with patience.

name: Cloudflare
tagline: Global network platform for performance and security
description: Cloudflare's edge network provides DDoS protection, CDN, workers, and security. Reliable and fast.
consensusVerdict: Best-kept secret in infrastructure. Worth every dollar.

name: Linear
description: Linear's blazing-fast issue tracker with keyboard shortcuts, automations, and GitHub integration. Built for speed.
consensusVerdict: Jira killer. So much faster, so much better UX.

name: Raspberry Pi 5
tagline: Affordable single-board computer for makers and developers
description: Raspberry Pi 5: quad-core ARM processor, 4GB RAM, PCIe, real performance. The affordable micro-computer standard.
consensusVerdict: Amazing value. The best of its kind. Shipping delays excepted.

name: OpenAI API
tagline: Bring GPT-4 capabilities into your application
description: OpenAI's API provides GPT-4, embeddings, and vision models via REST. Expensive but powerful. Frequent updates.
consensusVerdict: Cutting-edge AI in an API. Pricing is the tradeoff.

name: Figma
description: Figma's browser-based design tool powers design teams worldwide. Real-time collaboration, plugins, prototyping.

name: Datadog
tagline: Unified monitoring and analytics for modern applications
description: Datadog combines metrics, logs, traces, and APM. Comprehensive observability platform. Cost can escalate quickly.
